title: Photography Day 2025
description: Photography takes an instant out of time, altering life by holding it still.  -Dorothea Lange, American photographer.Wishing Happy World Photography Day 2025 from UIU Photography Club!
author: photographyclub@dccsa.uiu.ac.bd

title: Vertex : Language discussion
description:
We proudly presents another exciting chapter of Vertex!

This time, we dive into Language Discussion, where photography meets the art of storytelling through words, visuals and expressions. Join us for an engaging session filled with creative exchanges, thought-provoking conversations!
author: photographyclub@dccsa.uiu.ac.bd

title: Media Fest 2025 Achievements
description: UIU Media Fest 2025 celebrated the brightest talents in creativity, storytelling and we are proud to announce that our very own Executive Members shined with their remarkable achievements! Minhaz Hossain Shemul secured the 1st Runner-up in the Photography Segment, capturing powerful stories! Zannatul Amin Anika, Mayesha Tun Nur, and Jonayed Shah Jesun achieved the 1st Runner-up in the Media Quiz Competition, showcasing their sharp knowledge and passion for media studies. Your hard work, creativity and dedication truly reflect the spirit of excellence that defines UIUPC. Keep inspiring and reaching new milestones!
author: photographyclub@dccsa.uiu.ac.bd

title: Something is cooking??
description: Exciting news is on the horizon! UIU Photography Club is thrilled to announce that we are cooking up something special just for you. Keep an eye on our page for more details coming soon!

title: Prize Pool of Shutter Stories Chapter IV
description:
Shutter Stories has always been built by its people, photographers and storytellers. As we open Chapter IV, we invite you to become part of the legacy that has grown from a single idea into a nationwide celebration of visual art. 
This year, we’re offering an exciting 50K prize pool dedicated to celebrating outstanding photographs and visual stories across the country. It’s your chance to showcase your talent, gain recognition, and join the ranks of previous winners who have made their mark. 
Submit Now! Link in the comments!

title: Judge Announcement - Shutter Stories Chapter IV
description:
Introducing the first judge for Shutter Stories: Chapter IV, Mahmud Hossain Opu (@mahmudhossainopu), a distinguished visual journalist with global recognition. A documentary photographer whose work has appeared in The New York Times, National Geographic, The Economist and major agencies like AP, Reuters, AFP, Getty Images.
Call for Photo is Live! Link in the comments.
author: photographyclub@dccsa.uiu.ac.bd

title: Club Partners_Shutter Stories Chapter IV
description:
United Healthcare Presents Shutter Stories Chapter IV is powered by the strength of a nationwide community.
We’re proud to collaborate with photography clubs from various schools, colleges and universities across Bangladesh, each contributing to celebrate of storytelling. This collaboration makes this journey stronger and more meaningful. Together, we build the legacy.
Call for Photo is Live now! For submission: Call for Photo: Shutter Stories Chapter IV
author: photographyclub@dccsa.uiu.ac.bd

title: Judge Announcement - Shutter Stories Chapter IV
description:
We are proud to announce Mohammad Rakibul Hasan (@mohammadrakibulhasan)  as the judge for Shutter Stories Chapter IV.
An award-winning documentary photographer and visual artist, Mr. Hasan’s work has been featured in The New York Times, TIME, The Guardian, National Geographic and many other leading global publications. His powerful storytelling, focused on humanitarian issues, climate change, and social justice, has earned international recognition and numerous prestigious accolades.
We are honored to have him on our judging panel as we prepare to showcase impactful stories and exceptional photographic work in this year’s exhibition.
Call for Photo is Live! Link in the comments.
author: photographyclub@dccsa.uiu.ac.bd

title: Judge Announcement - Shutter Stories Chapter IV
description:
We are honored to introduce Hasan Chandan (@hasansaifuddinchandan) as judge for Shutter Stories Chapter IV.
A renowned street and documentary photographer, Mr. Chandan has inspired generations through his distinctive visual style, deep commitment to photography and decades of contribution to Bangladesh’s photography culture. His work has earned international recognition, with exhibitions across the world and a profound influence on emerging photographers in the country.
We are grateful to have him join our judging panel as we prepare to bring exceptional photographs and narratives to the forefront of this year’s exhibition.
author: photographyclub@dccsa.uiu.ac.bd

description:
